titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Danny Fields Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 12303601.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday March 7, 2018 at 19:07

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.unittitle: Joey Ramone book, drafts, printed emails, clippings and other materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, Ramones fan mail, "Punk" magazine notes, Ramones movie material, notes, manuscripts.

did.unittitle: Tommy Ramone, Monty Melnick, Matt Starr, Seth Abrams, interview transcripts, and email correspondence
Joey and Marky, Howard Stern interview transcripts, Daniel Rey, Arturo Vega interview transcripts
Ramona Musical by Ethan Silverman, drafts and email correspondence
Business papers, correspondence, contracts and telagrams
Empty CD cases "We're Outta Here", 2 copies of "Don't Worry About Me",

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Dee Dee and Arturo and friends, Roseland

list.item: 1980: Do You Remember Rock 'n' Roll Radio?
1989: Merry Christmas (I Don't Want to Fight Tonight)

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: CDs, "I Wanna Be Your Boyfriend"; "The Bowery Electric"; "What a Wonderful World"; untitled
Computer files copied from an external hard drive supplied by Danny Fields

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes digitized photographs by Danny Fields of The Ramones and New York City hustlers, or "richies".

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: No physical media exists. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Managerial agreements, clippings, correspondence, business papers, and photographs
Paleface, "Trouble in the Country," "Liar," "Burn + Rob," and interview, CMJ, Vista Hotel, NYC, 10/09
Paleface, "Trouble in the Country," rough cut, 1/13/1992
Paleface, 9/9/97, 1.) Cruise Control in Manhattan. 2.) Hard Core
Danny!, final mixes, Big City Cat, Laurel, GCS, Guy?
Dream On proof, hardcover, and paperback
Clippings, photocopies, interview transcripts, proofs, printed material, correspondence, and magazines
Life Magazine - "The Case of the 'Missing' Beatle: Paul is still with us"
Interview transcripts, printed material, magazines, scripts, miscellaneous correspondence
Correspondence, clippings, writings, notes, interviews, various printed material, including magazines
Interview material, emails, writings, and correspondence
Writings, correspondence, photographic prints, negatives, slides
Linda McCartney's Home Cooking, by Linda McCartney and Peter Cox
Linda McCartney On Tour, by Linda McCartney
Sixties: Portrait of an Era, by Linda McCartney
Roadworks: Photographs and Words, by Linda McCartney
"Linda McCartney - Wide Prairie," audio press kit
"Linda McCartney On Tour: Video News Release"
"Paul and Linda McCartney On the Simpsons"
"Linda McCartney Wide Prairie EPK Featuring Linda and Paul McCartney"
"TV Tributes to Linda, The Animals' Angel"
Linda McCartney's Home Cooking EPK, producer: Laura Gross
"Behind the Lens / clips A only," audiocassette
"Band on the Run Dialogue clips," audiocassette
"Danny [Fields] - Paul McCartney: Rock Roll Hall of Fame Induction," audiocassette
"[Danny] Fields and Linda Stein (after Paul)," audiocassette
Audiofiles related to Linda McCartney, 3 DVD-R
Rock and Roll Tour of New York
Writings, correspondence, photocopies, brochures, t-shirt, and various material.
"Jean Stein Danny Fields 'Edie' Interviews, 12 audio cassettes
"Ramones for Joey book etc, one of two", 12 audio cassettes
"Ramones for Joey book etc, two of two", 12 audio cassettes
"Important CD's - interviews, B'casts, orig casts, etc.", 37 compact discs
Digitized interviews from cassette albums, 1 TB external hard drive
Loose pages of 16 Magazine and Spec
Celebrity photos from 16 Magazine used in Who's Your Fave Rave
Correspondence, clippings, and other papers related to the publication of Who's Your Fave Rave?
Proof for Who's Your Fave Rave?
Materials related to Al Pacino, Scorpio, and The Godfather Part II
Press photographs, Bay City Rollers tour schedule
"The Sales History of 16 Magazine and What it Tells Us"
Contact sheet and negatives of pictures of Richard Young
Stavers clippings related to The Beatles and others
Copies of handwritten lyrics by Jim Morrison
Clippings from 16 Magazine compiled for Who's Your Fave Rave?

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Screenplays for movies and television shows including Kojack, The Great Houdinis, Ripper and Dillinger, and Sweeter in the Morning and press kits for television shows The Original American Bandstand Dancers, Charles in Charge, and Shining Time Station.

did.unittitle: Celebrity Magazine mockups, clippings, research, and other papers
Bay City Rollers fold-out insert mockup

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Clippings, professional correspondence, photocopies of photographs, and other papers.

did.unittitle: Gloria Stavers will and legal documents
Jim Morrison and Beatles clippings, notes and correspondence relating to use of photographs
Press kit for The History of British Rock
Bay City Rollers photographs and band information
Stavers correspondence regarding a book proposal
Stavers annotated clippings relating to rock 'n' roll and Jim Morrison
Papers relating to The Doors and photographs of Jim Morrison

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes buttons and a keychain for Jim Morrison and The Doors, pins and a button for The Beatles, and other buttons and pins.

did.unittitle: Stavers papers and legal correspondence relating to photograph licensing and copyright
Spec Magazine and 16 Magazine, bound edition
Gloria Stavers Story [Who's Your Fave Rave?] book proposal
Contact sheet of photographs of Bob Dylan
Beatles contact sheets, Help! press conference and other locations, and negative
Photographs of Gloria Stavers with celebrities
16 photograph file for Sajid Kahn and Jay North
Enlarged Beatles contact sheets, Help! press conference, outdoors
